title: Senior Software Engineer - Lybrate International Enterprises - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lybrate International Enterprises - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lybrate International Enterprises family as a Senior Software Engineer in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lybrate International Enterprises:
Lybrate International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate International Enterprises!
